{{Navbox |name=Shōwa nationalism |title=[[Statism in Shōwa Japan|Shōwa Statism]]<!-- This template is not limited to the ethnic Japanese and Mainland Japan. --> |state={{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass=hlist |group1=Themes |list1= * [[Anti-communism]] * ''[[Bushido]]'' * [[Corporatism]] * [[Emperor system]] * [[Fascism]] * ''[[Gekokujō]]'' * ''[[Hakkō ichiu]]'' * [[Japanese militarism]] * ''[[Kokutai]]'' * [[Pan-Asianism]] * [[State Shinto]] * [[Statism]] ** [[State capitalism|Capitalism]] * [[Totalitarianism]] * [[Ultranationalism (Japan)|Ultranationalism]] * ''[[Yamato-damashii]]''
|group2=Movements |list2= * [[Reform bureaucrats|Reform bureaucratism]] * [[Shōwa Restoration]]
|group3=People |list3= {{navbox|subgroup|groupstyle= |group1=Before 1945 |list1= * [[Hirohito]] * [[Sadao Araki]] * [[Inejirō Asanuma]] * [[Tanaka Chigaku]] * [[Kingoro Hashimoto]] * [[Hiranuma Kiichirō|Kiichirō Hiranuma]] * [[Koki Hirota]] * [[Nisshō Inoue]] * [[Kanji Ishiwara]] * [[Nobusuke Kishi]] * [[Ikki Kita]] * [[Kuniaki Koiso]] * [[Fumimaro Konoe]] * [[Jinzaburō Masaki]] * [[Seigō Nakano]] * [[Shūmei Ōkawa]] * [[Uesugi Shinkichi]] * [[Hideki Tojo]] * [[Masanobu Tsuji]]
|group2=Post-war Japan |list2= * [[Bin Akao]] * [[Yukio Mishima]] * [[Otoya Yamaguchi]]
|group3=Other |list3= * [[Subhas Chandra Bose]] * [[Park Chung Hee]] }}
|group4=Organizations and factions |list4= {{navbox|subgroup|groupstyle= |group1=Before 1945 |list1= * [[Black Ocean Society]] * [[Fleet faction]]
* ''[[Gakutotai]]'' * [[Great Japan Youth Party]] * [[Imperial Rule Assistance Association]] * [[Imperial Rule Assistance Political Association]] * [[Japanese Committee on Trade and Information]] * ''[[Kōdōha]]'' * [[League of Diet Members Supporting the Prosecution of the Holy War]] * [[National Defense Brotherhood]] * [[Kokuhonsha|National Foundation Society]] * [[National Spiritual Mobilization Movement (Japan)|National Spiritual Mobilization Movement]] * ''[[Sakurakai]]'' * ''[[Shōwa Kenkyūkai]]'' * ''[[Tōhōkai]]'' * ''[[Tōseiha]]'' * ''[[Yokusan Sonendan]]'' * [[February_26_Incident#The_"young_officers"|Young Officers Movement]] * ''[[Yūzonsha]]''
|group2=Post-war Japan |list2= * ''[[Nippon Kaigi]]'' * ''[[Tatenokai]]''
|group3=Other |list3= * [[Concordia Association]] * [[Makapili]] }}
|group5=History |list5= {{navbox|subgroup|groupstyle= |group1=1930s |list1= * [[February 26 Incident]] * [[League of Blood Incident]] * [[Marco Polo Bridge incident]] * [[March incident]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[Military Academy incident]] * [[Mukden incident]] * [[October incident]] * [[State General Mobilization Law]] * [[Washington_Naval_Treaty#Japanese_denunciation|Withdrawal from the Washington Naval Treaty]]
|group2=1940–1945 |list2= * [[Greater East Asia Co-Prosperity Sphere]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[Pacific War]] * [[Tripartite Pact]]
|group3=1945–1949 |list3= * [[Matsue incident]] * [[Purge (occupied Japan)|Purge]] * [[Reverse Course]]<!--- Most of the purged personnel are reinstated due to this incident.--> * [[Sanmu incident]]
|group4=After the 1950s |list4= * [[Yukio Mishima#Coup attempt and ritual suicide|Mishima incident]] }}
|group6=Works |list6= * ''[[An Investigation of Global Policy with the Yamato Race as Nucleus]]'' * ''[[How Japan Plans to Win]]'' * ''[[Kokutairon and Pure Socialism]]'' * ''[[Momotaro: Sacred Sailors]]'' * ''[[Momotarō no Umiwashi]]'' * ''[[Moyuru ōzora]]'' * ''[[Patriotism (short story)|Patriotism]]'' * ''[[Ode of Showa Restoration]]'' * ''[[Shinmin no Michi]]'' * ''[[Sun and Steel (essay)|Sun and Steel]]'' * ''[[The Most Beautiful]]''
|group8=Related topics |list8= * [[American cover-up of Japanese war crimes]] * ''[[The Cleanest Race]]'' * [[Collaboration with Imperial Japan]] ** [[Korean collaborators with Imperial Japan|Korean]] * [[Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[International Military Tribunal for the Far East]] * [[Japanese war crimes]] * [[Japanese history textbook controversies]] * [[List of World War II puppet states#Japan|List of World War II puppet states of Japan]] * [[Propaganda in Japan during the Second Sino-Japanese War and World War II]] * ''[[Uyoku dantai]]'' |below='''{{Icon|Category}} [[:Category:Shōwa Statism|Category]]''' }}<noinclude> [[Category:Nationalism navigational boxes]] [[Category:Shōwa Statism|*]]

{{Navbox |name=Shōwa nationalism |title=[[Statism in Shōwa Japan|Shōwa Statism]]<!-- This template is not limited to the ethnic Japanese and Mainland Japan. --> |state={{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass=hlist |group1=Themes |list1= * [[:en:Anti-communism|Anti-communism]] * ''[[Bushido]]'' * [[Corporatism]] * [[Emperor system]] * [[:en:Fascism|Fascism]] * ''[[Gekokujō]]'' * ''[[Hakkō ichiu]]'' * [[Japanese militarism]] * ''[[Kokutai]]'' * [[Pan-Asianism]] * [[State Shinto]] * [[Statism]] ** [[State capitalism|Capitalism]] * [[Totalitarianism]] * [[Ultranationalism (Japan)|Ultranationalism]] * ''[[Yamato-damashii]]''
|group2=Movements |list2= * [[Reform bureaucrats|Reform bureaucratism]] * [[Shōwa Restoration]]
|group3=People |list3= {{navbox|subgroup|groupstyle= |group1=Before 1945 |list1= * [[Hirohito]] * [[Sadao Araki]] * [[Inejirō Asanuma]] * [[Tanaka Chigaku]] * [[Kingoro Hashimoto]] * [[Hiranuma Kiichirō|Kiichirō Hiranuma]] * [[Koki Hirota]] * [[Nisshō Inoue]] * [[Kanji Ishiwara]] * [[Nobusuke Kishi]] * [[Ikki Kita]] * [[Kuniaki Koiso]] * [[Fumimaro Konoe]] * [[Jinzaburō Masaki]] * [[Seigō Nakano]] * [[Shūmei Ōkawa]] * [[Uesugi Shinkichi]] * [[Hideki Tojo]] * [[Masanobu Tsuji]]
|group2=Post-war Japan |list2= * [[:en:Bin Akao|Bin Akao]] * [[Yukio Mishima]] * [[Otoya Yamaguchi]]
|group3=Other |list3= * [[Subhas Chandra Bose]] * [[Park Chung Hee]] }}
|group4=Organizations and factions |list4= {{navbox|subgroup|groupstyle= |group1=Before 1945 |list1= * [[:en:Black Ocean Society|Black Ocean Society]] * [[:en:Fleet faction|Fleet faction]]
* ''[[:en:Gakutotai|Gakutotai]]'' * [[Great Japan Youth Party]] * [[Imperial Rule Assistance Association]] * [[Imperial Rule Assistance Political Association]] * [[Japanese Committee on Trade and Information]] * ''[[Kōdōha]]'' * [[League of Diet Members Supporting the Prosecution of the Holy War]] * [[National Defense Brotherhood]] * [[Kokuhonsha|National Foundation Society]] * [[National Spiritual Mobilization Movement (Japan)|National Spiritual Mobilization Movement]] * ''[[Sakurakai]]'' * ''[[Shōwa Kenkyūkai]]'' * ''[[Tōhōkai]]'' * ''[[Tōseiha]]'' * ''[[Yokusan Sonendan]]'' * [[February_26_Incident#The_"young_officers"|Young Officers Movement]] * ''[[Yūzonsha]]''
|group2=Post-war Japan |list2= * ''[[Nippon Kaigi]]'' * ''[[Tatenokai]]''
|group3=Other |list3= * [[Concordia Association]] * [[Makapili]] }}
|group5=History |list5= {{navbox|subgroup|groupstyle= |group1=1930s |list1= * [[:en:February 26 Incident|February 26 Incident]] * [[League of Blood Incident]] * [[Marco Polo Bridge incident]] * [[March incident]] * [[May 15 incident]] * [[Military Academy incident]] * [[Mukden incident]] * [[October incident]] * [[State General Mobilization Law]] * [[Washington_Naval_Treaty#Japanese_denunciation|Withdrawal from the Washington Naval Treaty]]
|group2=1940–1945 |list2= * [[Greater East Asia Co-Prosperity Sphere]] * [[Kyūjō incident]] * [[Pacific War]] * [[Tripartite Pact]]
|group3=1945–1949 |list3= * [[Matsue incident]] * [[Purge (occupied Japan)|Purge]] * [[Reverse Course]]<!--- Most of the purged personnel are reinstated due to this incident.--> * [[Sanmu incident]]
|group4=After the 1950s |list4= * [[Yukio Mishima#Coup attempt and ritual suicide|Mishima incident]] }}
|group6=Works |list6= * ''[[:en:An Investigation of Global Policy with the Yamato Race as Nucleus|An Investigation of Global Policy with the Yamato Race as Nucleus]]'' * ''[[How Japan Plans to Win]]'' * ''[[Kokutairon and Pure Socialism]]'' * ''[[Momotaro: Sacred Sailors]]'' * ''[[Momotarō no Umiwashi]]'' * ''[[Moyuru ōzora]]'' * ''[[Patriotism (short story)|Patriotism]]'' * ''[[Ode of Showa Restoration]]'' * ''[[Shinmin no Michi]]'' * ''[[Sun and Steel (essay)|Sun and Steel]]'' * ''[[The Most Beautiful]]''
|group8=Related topics |list8= * [[:en:American cover-up of Japanese war crimes|American cover-up of Japanese war crimes]] * ''[[The Cleanest Race]]'' * [[Collaboration with Imperial Japan]] ** [[Korean collaborators with Imperial Japan|Korean]] * [[Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[International Military Tribunal for the Far East]] * [[Japanese war crimes]] * [[Japanese history textbook controversies]] * [[List of World War II puppet states#Japan|List of World War II puppet states of Japan]] * [[Propaganda in Japan during the Second Sino-Japanese War and World War II]] * ''[[Uyoku dantai]]'' |below='''{{Icon|Category}} [[:Category:Shōwa Statism|Category]]''' }}<noinclude>

{{Navbox |name=Shōwa nationalism |title=[[:en:Statism in Shōwa Japan|Shōwa Statism]]<!-- This template is not limited to the ethnic Japanese and Mainland Japan. --> |state={{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass=hlist |group1=Themes |list1= * [[:en:Anti-communism|Anti-communism]] * ''[[:en:Bushido|Bushido]]'' * [[:en:Corporatism|Corporatism]] * [[:en:Emperor system|Emperor system]] * [[:en:Fascism|Fascism]] * ''[[:en:Gekokujō|Gekokujō]]'' * ''[[Hakkō ichiu]]'' * [[:en:Japanese militarism|Japanese militarism]] * ''[[Kokutai]]'' * [[:en:Pan-Asianism|Pan-Asianism]] * [[:en:State Shinto|State Shinto]] * [[:en:Statism|Statism]] ** [[:en:State capitalism|Capitalism]] * [[Totalitarianism]] * [[:en:Ultranationalism (Japan)|Ultranationalism]] * ''[[:en:Yamato-damashii|Yamato-damashii]]''
|group2=Movements |list2= * [[:en:Reform bureaucrats|Reform bureaucratism]] * [[Shōwa Restoration]]
|group3=People |list3= {{navbox|subgroup|groupstyle= |group1=Before 1945 |list1= * [[:en:Hirohito|Hirohito]] * [[:en:Sadao Araki|Sadao Araki]] * [[:en:Inejirō Asanuma|Inejirō Asanuma]] * [[:en:Tanaka Chigaku|Tanaka Chigaku]] * [[:en:Kingoro Hashimoto|Kingoro Hashimoto]] * [[:en:Hiranuma Kiichirō|Kiichirō Hiranuma]] * [[:en:Koki Hirota|Koki Hirota]] * [[:en:Nisshō Inoue|Nisshō Inoue]] * [[:en:Kanji Ishiwara|Kanji Ishiwara]] * [[:en:Nobusuke Kishi|Nobusuke Kishi]] * [[:en:Ikki Kita|Ikki Kita]] * [[:en:Kuniaki Koiso|Kuniaki Koiso]] * [[:en:Fumimaro Konoe|Fumimaro Konoe]] * [[:en:Jinzaburō Masaki|Jinzaburō Masaki]] * [[:en:Seigō Nakano|Seigō Nakano]] * [[Shūmei Ōkawa]] * [[:en:Uesugi Shinkichi|Uesugi Shinkichi]] * [[:en:Hideki Tojo|Hideki Tojo]] * [[:en:Masanobu Tsuji|Masanobu Tsuji]]
|group2=Post-war Japan |list2= * [[:en:Bin Akao|Bin Akao]] * [[:en:Yukio Mishima|Yukio Mishima]] * [[:en:Otoya Yamaguchi|Otoya Yamaguchi]]
|group3=Other |list3= * [[:en:Subhas Chandra Bose|Subhas Chandra Bose]] * [[:en:Park Chung Hee|Park Chung Hee]] }}
|group4=Organizations and factions |list4= {{navbox|subgroup|groupstyle= |group1=Before 1945 |list1= * [[:en:Black Ocean Society|Black Ocean Society]] * [[:en:Fleet faction|Fleet faction]]
* ''[[:en:Gakutotai|Gakutotai]]'' * [[:en:Great Japan Youth Party|Great Japan Youth Party]] * [[:en:Imperial Rule Assistance Association|Imperial Rule Assistance Association]] * [[:en:Imperial Rule Assistance Political Association|Imperial Rule Assistance Political Association]] * [[:en:Japanese Committee on Trade and Information|Japanese Committee on Trade and Information]] * ''[[:en:Kōdōha|Kōdōha]]'' * [[:en:League of Diet Members Supporting the Prosecution of the Holy War|League of Diet Members Supporting the Prosecution of the Holy War]] * [[:en:National Defense Brotherhood|National Defense Brotherhood]] * [[:en:Kokuhonsha|National Foundation Society]] * [[:en:National Spiritual Mobilization Movement (Japan)|National Spiritual Mobilization Movement]] * ''[[:en:Sakurakai|Sakurakai]]'' * ''[[Shōwa Kenkyūkai]]'' * ''[[Tōhōkai]]'' * ''[[Tōseiha]]'' * ''[[:en:Yokusan Sonendan|Yokusan Sonendan]]'' * [[February_26_Incident#The_"young_officers"|Young Officers Movement]] * ''[[:en:Yūzonsha|Yūzonsha]]''
|group2=Post-war Japan |list2= * ''[[:en:Nippon Kaigi|Nippon Kaigi]]'' * ''[[:en:Tatenokai|Tatenokai]]''
|group3=Other |list3= * [[:en:Concordia Association|Concordia Association]] * [[:en:Makapili|Makapili]] }}
|group5=History |list5= {{navbox|subgroup|groupstyle= |group1=1930s |list1= * [[:en:February 26 Incident|February 26 Incident]] * [[:en:League of Blood Incident|League of Blood Incident]] * [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge incident|Marco Polo Bridge incident]] * [[:en:March incident|March incident]] * [[:en:May 15 incident|May 15 incident]] * [[:en:Military Academy incident|Military Academy incident]] * [[:en:Mukden incident|Mukden incident]] * [[:en:October incident|October incident]] * [[:en:State General Mobilization Law|State General Mobilization Law]] * [[Washington_Naval_Treaty#Japanese_denunciation|Withdrawal from the Washington Naval Treaty]]
|group2=1940–1945 |list2= * [[:en:Greater East Asia Co-Prosperity Sphere|Greater East Asia Co-Prosperity Sphere]] * [[:en:Kyūjō incident|Kyūjō incident]] * [[:en:Pacific War|Pacific War]] * [[Tripartite Pact]]
|group3=1945–1949 |list3= * [[:en:Matsue incident|Matsue incident]] * [[:en:Purge (occupied Japan)|Purge]] * [[:en:Reverse Course|Reverse Course]]<!--- Most of the purged personnel are reinstated due to this incident.--> * [[:en:Sanmu incident|Sanmu incident]]
|group4=After the 1950s |list4= * [[Yukio Mishima#Coup attempt and ritual suicide|Mishima incident]] }}
|group6=Works |list6= * ''[[:en:An Investigation of Global Policy with the Yamato Race as Nucleus|An Investigation of Global Policy with the Yamato Race as Nucleus]]'' * ''[[:en:How Japan Plans to Win|How Japan Plans to Win]]'' * ''[[:en:Kokutairon and Pure Socialism|Kokutairon and Pure Socialism]]'' * ''[[:en:Momotaro: Sacred Sailors|Momotaro: Sacred Sailors]]'' * ''[[:en:Momotarō no Umiwashi|Momotarō no Umiwashi]]'' * ''[[:en:Moyuru ōzora|Moyuru ōzora]]'' * ''[[:en:Patriotism (short story)|Patriotism]]'' * ''[[:en:Ode of Showa Restoration|Ode of Showa Restoration]]'' * ''[[:en:Shinmin no Michi|Shinmin no Michi]]'' * ''[[:en:Sun and Steel (essay)|Sun and Steel]]'' * ''[[:en:The Most Beautiful|The Most Beautiful]]''
|group8=Related topics |list8= * [[:en:American cover-up of Japanese war crimes|American cover-up of Japanese war crimes]] * ''[[:en:The Cleanest Race|The Cleanest Race]]'' * [[:en:Collaboration with Imperial Japan|Collaboration with Imperial Japan]] ** [[:en:Korean collaborators with Imperial Japan|Korean]] * [[:en:Greater East Asia Conference|Greater East Asia Conference]] * [[:en:International Military Tribunal for the Far East|International Military Tribunal for the Far East]] * [[:en:Japanese war crimes|Japanese war crimes]] * [[:en:Japanese history textbook controversies|Japanese history textbook controversies]] * [[List of World War II puppet states#Japan|List of World War II puppet states of Japan]] * [[:en:Propaganda in Japan during the Second Sino-Japanese War and World War II|Propaganda in Japan during the Second Sino-Japanese War and World War II]] * ''[[:en:Uyoku dantai|Uyoku dantai]]'' |below='''{{Icon|Category}} [[:Category:Shōwa Statism|Category]]''' }}<noinclude>
